protocol.name: treeland_example_v1
protocol.copyright: SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 UnionTech Software Technology Co., Ltd. SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
protocol.description:
Replace this description with the protocol's purpose, object model, and lifecycle guarantees.
If this specification uses RFC 2119 keywords normatively, include the standard interpretation paragraph here.

interface.name: treeland_example_manager_v1
interface.description: Describe what this global creates, any singleton or binding rules, and a brief high-level workflow for clients.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Describe whether child objects must be destroyed first.

request.name: create_example
request.description: Describe ownership, required call scenarios, preconditions, and lifetime expectations.

interface.name: treeland_example_object_v1
interface.description: Describe the object's state, lifetime, and relation to Wayland core objects.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Describe any ordering constraints with related objects.

request.name: set_mode
request.description: Describe whether this is immediate or latched until commit.

event.name: configured
event.description: Describe event meaning, compositor-side trigger timing, and what the client should do next.
